name: commons
description: UserPromptSubmit + SessionStart + PreCompact + PostCompact hook — injects a cross-project do/dont layer from commons.tape + a live `pool` roster snapshot (~/.pool/pool.json); UserPromptSubmit re-injects every turn so the layer never fades from context. 0.11.0 (2026-05-28) drops the per-host `enabled` field + `[os,on|off]` rendering from the roster snapshot — every roster host is treated as always-on; SessionStart now renders `name[os]` per host, pi5-akida exclusion is handled downstream by pool-route's name-substring akida match. Companion ships: pool 0.8.9 + pool-route 0.12.0 (same always-on roster theme).
